layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps gap-4 to gap-6)
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align text and data; Optical alignment over geometric.

components.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px solid border (border-border). No soft shadows. Subtle shadow-sm on hover. Use neo-brutalist tactile variant where applicable.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover. Secondary: bg-surface text-text_primary border border-border hover:bg-surface_hover.
components.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned, text-sm, explicit hover states (hover:bg-surface_hover). Use Shadcn Table.
components.map: Use react-leaflet with CartoDB Dark Matter tile layer for the dark mode tactical map of the ASEAN region.
components.forms: Shadcn Inputs, Selects, and Forms. Background surface, 1px border. Focus ring 2px primary color.
components.navigation: Sticky left sidebar or top nav. Glassmorphism only for sticky top nav (bg-[#050A10]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background or border color on hover. transition-colors duration-200.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use mono-spaced text loaders or subtle radar sweep animations.
motion_and_interactions.data_updates: Flash green background briefly when new vessel data is extracted.

login_background.description: Abstract blue topographic map with glowing lines, used for the login page background with a black overlay (bg-black/60).

dashboard_hero_accent.description: Aerial view of a cargo ship sailing on the ocean, used sparingly in marketing or profile sections with a heavy dark overlay.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG AA. Never use pure black/gray without tint.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind with the provided color palette (use #050A10 as background).
2. Setup Google Fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.

4. Install and use react-leaflet for the map component. Use CartoDB Dark Matter tile layer ('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png') focusing on ASEAN coordinates (Lat: ~4.0, Lng: ~114.0).
5. Use Shadcn components for tables, dropdowns, buttons, inputs, dialogs.
6. Use recharts for the dashboard statistics.
7. Do not use generic placeholders for missing data, display '-' or 'N/A' styled clearly.
8. Ensure the dashboard utilizes a tight grid layout with a 'Command Center' aesthetic (Mode B Grid).
9. Implement a dark, immersive Login page utilizing the abstract glowing map image.
